title: Resolution authorizing Honorable Mayor Caesar P. Perez to enter into contract for the services of the following professionals and consultant with its corresponding monthly compensation: Municipal Nutrition Program (P17,000.00); Municipal Environment and Natural Resources Program (P17,000.00); Legal Consultant (P15,000.00); Municipal Sports Development (P5,000.00); Medical (Psychiatrist) Office (P6000.00) and Public Safety and Order (P10,000.00).
